title: "Item name" does not carry over when creating or moving an item to new board
excerpt: When using automation to create an item on a new board or move an item to a new board,  the actual item name from the source board is not carried over and the item that is created is named “New item”. Is there a way to c…

posts.author: Duston (Christopher Duston)
posts.cookedHtml: When using automation to create an item on a new board or move an item to a new board, the actual item name from the source board is not carried over and the item that is created is named “New item”. Is there a way to carry over the the actual item name from the source to the new item?
